facts.fact: Goal: Install QMD (github.com/tobi/qmd) as local search engine for memory files. SQLite + BM25 + vector similarity. Zero-cost, no API dependency.
Why: Backup/replacement for memory_search (OpenAI embeddings). Local = faster, free, works offline. Scales better with 200+ files.
Manu's priority: Wants to do this. Not urgent but important. 'Me parece una idea brillante. Daño no nos hace ninguno.'
Collections planned: 1) memory/ (daily notes, entities, protocols), 2) workspace/ (SOUL.md, MEMORY.md, PROJECTS.md), 3) scripts/ (documentation).

completedNote: Resolved via OpenClaw native memory_search with Ollama/nomic-embed-text. 221 files, 685 chunks indexed. Daily cron reindex at 4:30AM.
